phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso principale del Castello, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so preen-chee-PAH-leh del kah-STEL-loh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Dritto avanti, sotto il portone centrale.
likely_response.pronunciation: DREET-toh ah-VAHN-tee SOHT-toh EEL pohr-TOH-neh chehnt-RAH-leh
likely_response.translation_en: Straight ahead, under the central gate.

responses.english: Straight ahead, under the central gate.
responses.phonetic: DREET-toh ah-VAHN-tee SOHT-toh EEL pohr-TOH-neh chehnt-RAH-leh
responses.french: Dritto avanti, sotto il portone centrale.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora chiudono i musei, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah KYOO-doh-noh ee moo-ZEH-ee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa l'ingresso ai musei, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah ling-GRES-so ah-ee moo-ZEH-ee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trovano i servizi igienici, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see TROH-vah-noh ee ser-VEE-tsee ee-jeh-NEE-chee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Inside the courtyard, on the left.

responses.english: Inside the courtyard, on the left.
